code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i <= n
  let is_sep = if i == n
    true
  else
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
  end
  if is_sep
    if i > start
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut j = 0
mut first = true
let len = nums.len()
while j < len
  let v = match nums.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  j = j + 2
end
println(out)
